title: A new era for motorsport and high performance
zonesValue: Main circuit, karting, off-road area and simulators

features.structureDesc: PITLANE is conceived as a multifunctional complex integrating a next-generation racing circuit, a high-performance sports center, event and hospitality areas, and its own technological layer, designed for continuous year-round operation.
features.businessDesc: The project is supported by multiple complementary revenue streams, including circuit usage, sports and corporate events, training and high-performance programs, hospitality, strategic agreements and asset exploitation, reducing dependence on a single source.
features.locationDesc: The location in the province of Alicante offers climatic advantages, national and international connectivity, and proximity to key infrastructure.
